preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stretchy_report WHERE report_name = 'Savings Accounts Transactions Report'

insert.column: SELECT c.id AS "Client Id", CONCAT(c.firstname, ' ', COALESCE(c.middlename,''), ' ', COALESCE(c.lastname,'')) AS "Client Name", sa.id AS "Saving Account Id", sa.account_no AS "Savings account no.", t.id AS "Transaction Id", to_char(COALESCE(t.submitted_on_date, t.created_date::date, t.transaction_date), 'DD Month YYYY') AS "Value Date", to_char(t.transaction_date, 'DD Month YYYY') AS "Transaction Date", sa.external_id AS "External Id", CASE t.transaction_type_enum WHEN 1 THEN 'Deposit' WHEN 2 THEN 'Withdrawal' WHEN 3 THEN 'Interest Posting' WHEN 4 THEN 'Withdrawal Fee' WHEN 5 THEN 'Annual Fee' WHEN 12 THEN 'Dividend Payout' WHEN 13 THEN 'Overdraft Interest' WHEN 21 THEN 'Withhold Tax' ELSE 'Other' END AS "Transaction Type", CASE WHEN t.transaction_type_enum IN (2,4,5,13,21) THEN t.amount ELSE NULL END AS "Debit", CASE WHEN t.transaction_type_enum IN (1,3,12) THEN t.amount ELSE NULL END AS "Credit", t.running_balance_derived AS "Balance" FROM m_savings_account_transaction t JOIN m_savings_account sa ON sa.id = t.savings_account_id JOIN m_client c ON c.id = sa.client_id WHERE t.is_reversed = FALSE AND (${clientId} = -1 OR c.id = ${clientId}) AND (${savingsId} = -1 OR sa.id = ${savingsId}) ORDER BY c.id ASC, sa.id ASC, t.transaction_date DESC, t.id DESC

changeSet.author: CredibleX

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stretchy_report WHERE report_name = 'Savings Accounts Transactions Report'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stretchy_parameter WHERE parameter_name IN ('Client','Savings')

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO stretchy_report_parameter (report_id, parameter_id, report_parameter_name) SELECT r.id, p.id, p.parameter_name FROM stretchy_report r JOIN stretchy_parameter p ON p.parameter_name IN ('Client','Savings') WHERE r.report_name = 'Savings Accounts Transactions Report' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM stretchy_report_parameter srp WHERE srp.report_id = r.id AND srp.parameter_id = p.id );
